## Problem

What problem would this solve? (e.g. "I want to add a new screen but there's no guidance for X.")

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples from other projects if relevant.
